dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This action cannot be undone.

reports.noProjectsDesc: Create a project to see summaries here.

wizard.presenceCountriesDesc: Countries/regions to enhance digital presence (not limited to business countries)

wizard.multipleEmails: You can add multiple email addresses

hero.badge: Zero API costs — Flat rate with local AI
hero.title: Maximize your digital presence automatically with AI, 24/7
hero.subtitle: SEO + AI optimization, fully automated! From Google to ChatGPT & Gemini — we make your brand discoverable everywhere, 24/7, on autopilot.
hero.disruption: The era of search ads is ending. Ads disappear when you stop paying. Presence built with PV lasts forever.

effects.label: Expected Results
items: More brand mentions in ChatGPT, Gemini & others

cta.bottomTitle: Your first step to zero ad spend
cta.bottomSubtitle: 7-day free trial of all features after payment registration.

features.sectionSubtitle: From keyword discovery to content generation, distribution, and tracking. AI handles it all autonomously, 24/7.

keyword.title: Auto Long-Tail Keyword Discovery
keyword.desc: Automatic long-tail keyword discovery — Collects 100+ keywords from Google Search. Finds the exact words people are searching for, forming the foundation for targeted content.

content.title: Automatic Content Generation
content.desc: Automatic content generation — Articles, FAQs, Schema.org markup, and translations, all generated by local AI. Zero API costs. Your blog grows every day without hiring anyone.

distribution.title: Distributed Presence Delivery
distribution.desc: Distributed presence syndication — Auto-publishes to 25+ channels including Twitter, Medium, Reddit, Quora, note.com. AI posts on your behalf across every platform worldwide.

llmMonitoring.title: LLM Citation Monitoring
llmMonitoring.desc: LLM citation monitoring — Real-time tracking of brand mentions in ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity. Always know how AI is talking about you.

serp.title: SERP Tracking & Auto Strategy
serp.desc: SERP tracking & auto-strategy — Tracks search ranking changes after publishing. 'This article hit #3, that one's still nowhere' → AI automatically plans the next move.

autonomous.title: 24/7 Autonomous Operation
autonomous.desc: 24/7 autonomous operation — Engine runs continuously on VPS. While you sleep, while you're on vacation, your digital presence keeps growing.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 4 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Just enter a URL. AI automatically generates a plan and runs 24/7.

step1.title: Setup
step1.desc: Enter URL, configure brand voice, connect channels, upload assets

step2.title: AI Runs 24/7
step2.desc: Keyword discovery → article generation → distribution runs automatically around the clock

step3.title: Hub & Spoke Distribution
step3.desc: Articles published on your site (hub) → link-back versions distributed to each channel (spoke)

step4.title: Presence Grows
step4.desc: Search rankings rise, AI citations increase, and backlinks accumulate automatically

hubSpoke.title: Hub & Spoke Distribution
hubSpoke.subtitle: Your site is home base. Every channel is a branch office that brings people back.
hubSpoke.explanation: Write one article, and AI automatically transforms it into a Twitter thread, a LinkedIn business post, an Instagram card, and more. Every post links back to your site, so visitors always find their way to you. This continuously builds your Google authority (domain authority) on autopilot.

channels.title: 25+ Distribution Channels
channels.subtitle: Social media, blogs, Q&A sites, and regional platforms. Auto-distribute to every channel.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: All plans include zero API costs and unlimited local AI.
pricing.aiBoostDesc: High-quality article generation powered by GPT-4o / Claude. Produce in-depth, original content beyond local AI capabilities.

trust.title: Amplifying only trusted entities, the right way
trust.subtitle: PresenceVision is not a stealth marketing tool. It is a platform that increases the visibility of real, high-quality products and services with full transparency and legal compliance.

verified.title: Verified Entity Only
verified.desc: Only entities that pass corporate verification, official website validation, and real service screening can use the platform. Anonymous or fictitious brands are not permitted.

evidence.title: Evidence-Required Publishing
evidence.desc: Content without primary sources, official data, academic papers, or news references is automatically blocked from publishing. Unsubstantiated claims and exaggerations are detected and filtered.

score.title: Entity Trust Score
score.desc: Continuous scoring based on news citations, external links, social media mentions, and verified business ratings. Low-scoring entities face distribution restrictions.

stealth.title: Act against Unjustifiable Premiums and Misleading Representations (Japan)
stealth.desc: Fully compliant with Japan's stealth marketing regulation enacted October 2023. All generated content includes proper disclosures to prevent consumer deception.

ftc.title: FTC Endorsement Guides (US)
ftc.desc: Compliant with the U.S. Federal Trade Commission's Endorsement Guidelines. Clear distinction between advertising and organic content is strictly enforced.

dsa.title: EU Digital Services Act
dsa.desc: Adheres to transparency requirements under the EU Digital Services Act. Proper disclosure is maintained for all content distribution on platforms.

google.title: Google Search Essentials
google.desc: Content generation and distribution follows Google Search Essentials (formerly Webmaster Guidelines). No spam policy violations are employed.

adDiff.title: How we differ from "ad optimization AI"
adDiff.subtitle: AI ad tools like Claude Ads make your ads smarter. PV makes ads unnecessary.

whenStopped.label: When stopped?
whenStopped.ad: Ads disappear, traffic drops to zero
whenStopped.pv: Content remains, rankings and AI citations persist

output.label: Output
output.pv: Search #1 + AI citations + natural presence across 25+ channels

adDiff.complementNote: Ads are effective for short-term acquisition. PV builds organic presence over time, gradually reducing ad dependency to zero — that is the PresenceVision philosophy.
